titleStmt.title: SII 39.13: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 13. (A.R. No. 13 of 1916.) SAṈṈAVAṈAM, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SĀLYAVANĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE SAME TEMPLE. JAṬĀVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHU, PARĀKRAMA PĀṆḌYA DĒVA, 2+28 = 30TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of land as kuḍinīngā-kāṇi made in accordance with a previous grant of Mummuḍichōḻar Māḷavamāṇikkam alias Uḍaiyār Māḷavachakravartin, for maintaining a lamp in the same temple, by the chief mentioned in No. 12.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī koṟcaṭai paṉmarāṉa tiṟipuva
ṉac cakkaṟavattikaḷ śrī parākkiṟama pā
ṇṭiya tevaṟku Āṇṭu 2 Ā
vatuk ketir 2 10 8 Āvatu vicaiya
varuṣam Āvaṇi mātam 5 § Iravikula
maṉṉaṉ koṅkaviraṉ Urupa
nārāyaṇaṉ ciraṅka nātar
Iraṇavirap perumāḷ Āṉa
kāṅkeyaṉeṉ caṉṉavanattu
tirumaṭaiviḷākattil Irukkum
Āṇṭārkaḷ Iraṇṇiyaciṅka maṅkala
ttu Ilaikkaṭampaṅkuḷattu vayal
vaḷaiyiṟ cuṟṟu muṟṟilum maram
cum viḷakkuppuṟam maṉittar Iṟaiyili
niṅkalāka Uḷḷa paṟṟu muṟṟilum Uṭaiyār
caṉṉavaṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku mummuṭi
coḻaṉ māḷavamāṇikkamāṉa Uṭaiyār
māḷuvacakkaravattikaḷ veṭṭikkuṭutta kal
veṭṭiṉpaṭi Oṉṟu pātikku kaṭamaiyum Iṟuttu I
ṟaiyum(n) tavittuṉam vayal Oṉṟu pātik
t toruvāramum Iṭṭu cantirātitta
vaṟcella Icaintu kuṭiniṅkāk kāṇiyā
ka Āḷakkaṭavārkaḷ Ākavum Itu kallilum
cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka Āmarasamam
Digital edition of SII 39.13 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
